gen: select (sum(hc.children_age_1223_months_fully_vaccinated) * 1000.0 / nullif(sum(hc.number_of_hh_surveyed), 0)) * 100 as percentage_fully_vaccinated_children from healthcare_stats hc join regions r on hc.state = r.state join tru t on hc.tru_id = t.id where r.area_name = 'rural' and t.name = 'haryana' and hc.number_of_hh_surveyed > 0 and hc.children_age_1223_months_fully_vaccinated > 0

q: Is the percentage of institutional births higher in Urban or Rural Nagaland?
gt: select case when (select h.institutional_births_in_the_5_years_before_the_survey_ from healthcare_stats h join regions r on h.state = r.state join tru t on h.tru_id = t.id where r.area_name = 'nagaland' and t.name = 'urban') > (select h.institutional_births_in_the_5_years_before_the_survey_ from healthcare_stats h join regions r on h.state = r.state join tru t on h.tru_id = t.id where r.area_name = 'nagaland' and t.name = 'rural') then 'urban' else 'rural' end
gen: select r.area_name, sum(hi.institutional_births) as total_institutional_births from healthcare_stats hi join regions r on hi.state=r.state join tru t on hi.tru_id=t.id where t.name in ('urban', 'rural') group by r.area_name order by total_institutional_births desc

q: Which state have the lowest percentage of institutional births?

gen: select ls.person from language_stats ls join regions r on ls.state = r.state join languages l on ls.language_id = l.id join tru t on ls.tru_id = t.id where r.area_name = 'odisha' and l.name = 'english' and t.name = 'total'

q: What is the total Muslim population in total Nagaland?
gt: select rs.tot_p from religion_stats rs join regions r on rs.state = r.state join religions rel on rs.religion_id = rel.id join tru t on rs.tru_id = t.id where r.area_name = 'nagaland' and rel.religion_name = 'muslim' and t.name = 'total'
gen: select sum(rs.tot_p) as total_nagaland_muslim_population from religion_stats rs join regions r on rs.state = r.state join religions rel on rs.religion_id = rel.id where r.area_name = 'nagaland' and rel.religion_name = 'muslim'

q: Which top 5 have the highest percentage of institutional births?
gt: select r.area_name from healthcare_stats h join regions r on h.state = r.state join tru t on h.tru_id = t.id where t.name = 'total' order by cast(h.institutional_births_in_the_5_years_before_the_survey_ as double precision) desc limit 5
gen: select r.area_name, sum(hi.institutional_births) as total_institutional_births from healthcare_stats hi join regions r on hi.state=r.state join tru t on hi.tru_id=t.id where t.name='rural' group by r.area_name order by total_institutional_births desc limit 5

gen: select r.area_name, sum(h.pu) as urban_pu, sum(h.ru) as rural_pu from healthcare_stats h join regions r on h.state=r.state join tru t on h.tru_id=t.id where t.name in ('urban', 'rural') group by r.area_name order by urban_pu desc, rural_pu desc

q: What is the Area Sown 2025 26 for Foodgrains?
gt: select area_sown_2025_26 from crop_stats where crop = 'foodgrains'
gen: select cs.area_sown_2025_26 from crop_stats cs join regions r on cs.normal_area_dafw = r.state where r.area_name = 'india'
